title: Techless
description: A Mod that adds 3 new bosses with unique phases Fight them to craft Legendary weapons in this Vanilla+ progression mod Made using Mcreator
body:
DISCLAMER ALL LOREBOOKS HAVE BEEN WRITTEN BY AI AND ITEM DESCRIPTIONS HAVE BEEN ENHANCED BY AI
thank you.

This mod adds to the vanilla progression by adding new bosses and weapons I suggest you play this mod on singleplayer for the best experince

this mod adds a whole lot of content including an Overarching storyline following you the player it delves deep into the lore of redstone and AEGIS a Mechanical god who once ruled minecraft along with smaller stories regarding many deities

adds 5 new armour sets each providing buffs to the player 
armour sets

-tessellation

-AEGIS MK1

-overfluxed AEGIS

-TIMESPACE

-cleric

additionally adds 10+ weapons each with their own unique abilities which you'll have to try! these weapons include!

-Aqua's end a katana which deals % dmg

-the Aegis Cannons 

-dawnbreaker/voidrend

-and many more!

this mod adds over 20 new materials some of which are required to craft these weapons some of these materials are dropped from difficult bosses such as AEGIS who has 3 unique phaseses!

this was my first ever big project i would love for you to try I've poured hours of time trying to make this the best experience you'll ever have!

If you encounter any bugs please Report them here
email:techmaster5234@gmail.com

This was made Using Mcreator!
